name: winchronicle-workday
description: Thin Codex entry point for explicit WinChronicle workday recording.

interface.shortDescription: Start and stop explicit local workday recording from Codex.
interface.longDescription: A thin Codex wrapper for WinChronicle workday commands. It routes natural-language workday phrases to existing local CLI commands without adding screenshots, OCR, clipboard capture, desktop control, cloud upload, or MCP write tools.
